title: Rebecca Survives D Block
description: Pages 11–14 focus on rebecca survives d block, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as rebecca struggles through D Block as Cavendish, the crowd, and unseen forces turn the Colosseum match into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This woman's fighting style!! It's not at all Unbeauti- Full!! (It's beautiful)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I've got to be honest here!! I really don't dislike her!! (I like her)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: But this Tourna- went could be different!! With strong contend- Ers gathered from every country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And all sorts of fighting styles!! Many are nothing like your common, proper Gladia- for!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Now how many bones should I break!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Southeastly : "Majiatsuka Kingdom" Army. Commander: Rolling Logan

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: In the Colosseum: Basement medical treatment waiting room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But my Gramps who went in there earlier still hasn't come out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he's dead!! Hey!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: My gramps is the kind of guy who I thought wouldn't die even if you killed him, but... I guess that's old age for ya!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It's not that he hasn't come out yet.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: The exit is just further inside, so he won't be coming back here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Ah! So that's how it is...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Sorry about that misunder- standing... no,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I really apologize... there's no excuse...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: don't worry about him. His feelings get the best of him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Participant Sai of Kano- Kuni, Yes?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: You guys too!! What the hell is this!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: All the losers in this competition so far... seems like we've all been dropped down here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: There's no way out! We've been trapped by that Doflamingo bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: The King Punch doesn't even work on these walls...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: This is a basement, right? So the "walls" are the earth itself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: but what do they presume to do with us...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: that we'll be receiving medical treatment down here.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: I'll hold this grudge as far as even your grand- children!!!

summary: Rebecca Survives D Block focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as rebecca struggles through D Block as Cavendish, the crowd, and unseen forces turn the Colosseum match into chaos.
